business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial General Liability — Products-Completed Operations Aggregate
Commercial General Liability — Personal and Advertising Injury
Commercial General Liability — Damage to Rented Premises
Commercial General Liability — Medical Expense (Coverage C)

positives: Supplementary payments for defense costs are outside policy limits under Coverages A and B
Designated Construction Projects General Aggregate Limit endorsement provides separate aggregate per project (CG 25 03)
Additional insured coverage extended to owners, lessees or contractors for both ongoing operations and completed operations
concerns: Exclusion — Designated Operations/Premises endorsement (CG 21 44) excludes bodily injury and property damage arising from designated operations or premises
Hospitality sector with integrated restaurant and event operations presents elevated slip-and-fall and liquor-related liability exposure
Policy terms may be amended or waived only by endorsement; no oral modifications permitted

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 7011. Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.
